healthReason: Copilot event pipeline producing 0 events despite 364K total API events — conference demo dependency (#41). ecosystem-scout missing SKILL.md. Infrastructure (workers, queue, telemetry) healthy.

swarmHealthScript.detail: check-swarm-health.sh: 0 agents checked (132 skipped — log dir not on this host/worktree). All agents deferred to main jared host.

copilotEventPipeline.detail: PARTIAL — 43 copilot agents registered with SKILL.md, but 0 copilot events in API (364,667 total events present). No copilot agent log files found on this host. Conference demo dependency (#41).
copilotEventPipeline.note: check-swarm-health.sh misreports this as 'verified (0 events)' — status=pass because verify-copilot-events.sh only fails on errors, not warnings. This masking should be fixed.

issues.title: ecosystem-scout missing SKILL.md
issues.detail: Agent is enabled in schedule.json (weekly: 0 9 * * 6, jared box) but has no claude/scheduled-tasks/ecosystem-scout/SKILL.md. Will fail or run without context.
issues.action: Create SKILL.md for ecosystem-scout or disable it if not yet ready.

issues.title: Copilot event pipeline producing 0 events — conference demo dependency
issues.detail: 364,667 total events in API but none tagged from copilot agents. No copilot agent log files found. Tracked in #41 (conference demo dependency for May 6 talk).
issues.action: Investigate why copilot-driven agents are not producing telemetry events. May need log files on jared host to confirm agents are running.

issues.title: check-swarm-health.sh masks copilot pipeline PARTIAL as healthy
issues.detail: verify-copilot-events.sh returns status='pass' for warnings (only fails on errors), so the health script prints 'Copilot event pipeline: verified (0 events)' — misleading when the pipeline is actually PARTIAL.
issues.action: Consider surfacing warn/partial states from verify-copilot-events.sh in health check output.

dogfood: No AgentGuard governance issues observed this run.
